entities.girl: a girl licking an ice cream cone
entities.ice_cream: a tall ice cream cone with three scoops

scenes.title: The Ice Cream Shop
scenes.background_prompt: A colorful ice cream shop with a glass display case of ice cream tubs, a tiled counter, a neon 'OPEN' sign, and a striped awning outside. No people, no ice cream cones.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A colorful ice cream shop on a warm day. A girl of about eight in a yellow t-shirt and denim shorts stands just outside the shop under a pink and white striped awning, holding a tall waffle cone with three scoops — chocolate on top, strawberry in the middle, and vanilla at the bottom. The scoops are perfectly round and glistening with cold, tiny ice crystals visible on the surface. The girl licks the top scoop with a big smile. Behind her through the open door, a glass display case shows rows of colorful ice cream tubs. A neon 'OPEN' sign glows pink in the window. A small chalkboard easel on the sidewalk lists today's flavors.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl just outside the shop under the awning, standing and holding a tall waffle cone with three scoops (chocolate, strawberry, vanilla), licking the top scoop and smiling. Place ice_cream cone in her hand with scoops glistening and icy.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground of this children's picture-book scene, a grassy field is scattered with small yellow and white flowers and green clovers. Three flat, grey stepping stones are positioned on the grass, leading towards the center. On the far left, a large tree with a thick brown trunk and rounded green foliage frames the scene. To the right of the tree, a girl with long, wavy brown hair tied back with a yellow bow stands in profile, facing right. She is dressed in a green cardigan over a light blue patterned dress, white socks with a grey stripe, and brown shoes. She holds a large ice_cream cone with three scoops—white, pink, and brown—topped with a red cherry, and she is licking the top scoop. Directly behind the girl is a wooden ice cream stand featuring a blue and yellow striped scalloped awning. The stand has a glass display case showing several rectangular containers of different colored ice cream. A large, blank rectangular wooden sign sits atop the stand, and a smaller one is fixed to its right side. To the right of the stand, there are several green bushes and two terracotta pots holding leafy plants. In the background, rolling green hills stretch across the horizon under a light blue sky dotted with soft, white, fluffy clouds, indicating a bright, sunny day. The scene is composed with the girl and the stand as the central focus, surrounded by lush greenery and a clear sky.
